---
title: "Assignment 2: Consultation Corpus Analysis Report"
subtitle: "Artifact-driven summary of the configured compiled corpus"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: false
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  include = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  out.width = "100%"
)

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(glue)
library(jsonlite)
library(knitr)
library(readr)
library(tibble)
library(yaml)

resolve_root <- function() {
  candidates <- c(".", "..")
  for (cand in candidates) {
    config_path <- file.path(cand, "config", "project_config.yml")
    if (file.exists(config_path)) {
      return(normalizePath(cand, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
    }
  }
  stop("Could not locate config/project_config.yml from the current working directory.")
}

safe_read_csv <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
}

safe_read_json <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  jsonlite::fromJSON(path, simplifyVector = FALSE)
}

`%||%` <- function(x, y) {
  if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0) {
    return(y)
  }
  x
}

fmt_pct <- function(x, digits = 1) {
  if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0 || is.na(x)) {
    return("NA")
  }
  paste0(format(round(as.numeric(x), digits), nsmall = digits), "%")
}

excerpt_text <- function(text, limit = 220) {
  value <- ifelse(is.na(text), "", as.character(text))
  value <- gsub("\\s+", " ", value)
  value <- trimws(value)
  too_long <- nchar(value, type = "width") > limit
  value[too_long] <- paste0(substr(value[too_long], 1, limit - 1), "…")
  value
}

safe_include_graphics <- function(path) {
  if (file.exists(path)) {
    knitr::include_graphics(path)
  } else {
    cat(glue("Figure not found yet: `{basename(path)}`"))
  }
}

theme_report_plot <- function() {
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, margin = margin(b = 10)),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
      axis.text = element_text(color = "#374151"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#e9edf2", linewidth = 0.35),
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 10, lineheight = 0.95),
      legend.key.height = grid::unit(0.85, "cm"),
      legend.spacing.y = grid::unit(0.12, "cm"),
      legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
      plot.margin = margin(8, 18, 8, 8)
    )
}

sort_cluster_ids <- function(ids) {
  ids_chr <- as.character(ids)
  ids_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(ids_chr))
  ids_chr[order(is.na(ids_num), ids_num, ids_chr)]
}

wrap_plot_text <- function(text, width = 24) {
  value <- ifelse(is.na(text), "", as.character(text))
  vapply(
    value,
    function(item) paste(strwrap(item, width = width), collapse = "\n"),
    character(1)
  )
}

plot_cluster_map_with_labels <- function(cluster_df, cluster_overview) {
  required_cols <- c("cluster_id", "map_x", "map_y")
  if (is.null(cluster_df) || !all(required_cols %in% names(cluster_df))) {
    cat("Cluster map coordinates not available yet.")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  plot_df <- cluster_df |>
    transmute(
      cluster_id = as.character(cluster_id),
      map_x = as.numeric(map_x),
      map_y = as.numeric(map_y)
    ) |>
    filter(!is.na(cluster_id), !is.na(map_x), !is.na(map_y))

  if (nrow(plot_df) == 0) {
    cat("Cluster map coordinates not available yet.")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  label_df <- plot_df |>
    group_by(cluster_id) |>
    summarise(
      map_x = median(map_x),
      map_y = median(map_y),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  if (!is.null(cluster_overview) && "frame_label" %in% names(cluster_overview)) {
    label_df <- label_df |>
      left_join(
        cluster_overview |>
          transmute(
            cluster_id = as.character(cluster_id),
            frame_label = frame_label
          ) |>
          distinct(cluster_id, .keep_all = TRUE),
        by = "cluster_id"
      )
  }

  label_df <- label_df |>
    mutate(
      frame_label = ifelse(
        is.na(frame_label) | !nzchar(trimws(frame_label)),
        paste0("Cluster ", cluster_id),
        frame_label
      ),
      legend_label = paste0("Cluster ", cluster_id, ": ", frame_label)
    )

  cluster_ids <- sort_cluster_ids(unique(plot_df$cluster_id))
  label_df <- label_df |>
    arrange(match(cluster_id, cluster_ids))

  base_palette <- c(
    "#4C78A8",
    "#F58518",
    "#54A24B",
    "#E45756",
    "#B279A2",
    "#72B7B2",
    "#9D755D",
    "#E2CF45"
  )
  cluster_palette <- stats::setNames(
    rep(base_palette, length.out = length(cluster_ids)),
    cluster_ids
  )
  legend_labels <- stats::setNames(
    wrap_plot_text(label_df$legend_label, width = 28),
    label_df$cluster_id
  )

  plot_df$cluster_id <- factor(plot_df$cluster_id, levels = cluster_ids)
  label_df$cluster_id <- factor(label_df$cluster_id, levels = cluster_ids)

  ggplot2::ggplot(
    plot_df,
    ggplot2::aes(x = map_x, y = map_y, colour = cluster_id)
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(size = 1.65, alpha = 0.72, stroke = 0) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(
      data = label_df,
      ggplot2::aes(x = map_x, y = map_y, colour = cluster_id),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      shape = 21,
      fill = "white",
      stroke = 1.4,
      size = 5.4,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_colour_manual(
      values = cluster_palette,
      breaks = cluster_ids,
      labels = legend_labels
    ) +
    ggplot2::guides(
      colour = ggplot2::guide_legend(
        override.aes = list(size = 4, alpha = 1),
        byrow = TRUE
      )
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = "Embedding map colored by interpreted cluster",
      x = "t-SNE dimension 1",
      y = "t-SNE dimension 2"
    ) +
    ggplot2::coord_equal() +
    theme_report_plot() +
    ggplot2::theme(
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.justification = c(0, 1)
    )
}

cluster_label_table <- function(cluster_overview, cluster_ids) {
  labels <- tibble::tibble(cluster_id = as.character(cluster_ids))
  if (!is.null(cluster_overview) && "frame_label" %in% names(cluster_overview)) {
    labels <- labels |>
      left_join(
        cluster_overview |>
          transmute(
            cluster_id = as.character(cluster_id),
            frame_label = frame_label
          ) |>
          distinct(cluster_id, .keep_all = TRUE),
        by = "cluster_id"
      )
  }

  labels |>
    mutate(
      frame_label = ifelse(
        is.na(frame_label) | !nzchar(trimws(frame_label)),
        paste0("Cluster ", cluster_id),
        frame_label
      ),
      cluster_display = paste0("Cluster ", cluster_id),
      cluster_axis_label = wrap_plot_text(paste0(cluster_display, ": ", frame_label), width = 34)
    )
}

prepare_cluster_share_data <- function(cluster_df, cluster_overview, category_col, top_n = 6) {
  required_cols <- c("cluster_id", category_col)
  if (is.null(cluster_df) || !all(required_cols %in% names(cluster_df))) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  plot_df <- cluster_df
  if ("parent_document_id" %in% names(plot_df)) {
    plot_df <- plot_df |>
      distinct(cluster_id, parent_document_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
  }

  category_values <- plot_df[[category_col]]
  category_values <- ifelse(is.na(category_values) | !nzchar(trimws(as.character(category_values))), "Unknown", as.character(category_values))
  top_categories <- names(sort(table(category_values), decreasing = TRUE))[seq_len(min(top_n, length(unique(category_values))))]
  category_values <- ifelse(category_values %in% top_categories, category_values, "Other")

  share_df <- plot_df |>
    transmute(
      cluster_id = as.character(cluster_id),
      category = category_values
    ) |>
    count(cluster_id, category, name = "n") |>
    group_by(cluster_id) |>
    mutate(share = 100 * n / sum(n)) |>
    ungroup()

  cluster_ids <- sort_cluster_ids(unique(share_df$cluster_id))
  label_tbl <- cluster_label_table(cluster_overview, cluster_ids)

  share_df |>
    left_join(label_tbl, by = "cluster_id") |>
    mutate(
      cluster_axis_label = factor(cluster_axis_label, levels = rev(label_tbl$cluster_axis_label)),
      category = factor(category, levels = rev(sort(unique(category))))
    )
}

plot_cluster_share_chart <- function(share_df, title) {
  if (is.null(share_df) || nrow(share_df) == 0) {
    cat("Composition figure not available yet.")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  fill_values <- stats::setNames(
    grDevices::hcl.colors(length(levels(share_df$category)), "Set 2"),
    levels(share_df$category)
  )

  ggplot2::ggplot(
    share_df,
    ggplot2::aes(x = share, y = cluster_axis_label, fill = category)
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_col(width = 0.72, colour = "white", linewidth = 0.22) +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = fill_values) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(0, 100),
      breaks = c(0, 25, 50, 75, 100),
      labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
      expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0, 0.01))
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = title,
      x = "Share within cluster",
      y = NULL
    ) +
    theme_report_plot() +
    ggplot2::theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.direction = "horizontal",
      legend.box = "vertical",
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()
    ) +
    ggplot2::guides(fill = ggplot2::guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE))
}

prepare_attachment_rate_data <- function(cluster_df, cluster_overview) {
  if (is.null(cluster_df) || !"cluster_id" %in% names(cluster_df)) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  if ("chunk_source" %in% names(cluster_df)) {
    rate_df <- cluster_df |>
      transmute(
        cluster_id = as.character(cluster_id),
        attachment_rate = 100 * as.numeric(chunk_source == "attachment_markdown")
      ) |>
      group_by(cluster_id) |>
      summarise(attachment_rate = mean(attachment_rate, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
    title <- "Share of units sourced from attachment markdown"
  } else if ("has_attachment" %in% names(cluster_df)) {
    plot_df <- cluster_df
    if ("parent_document_id" %in% names(plot_df)) {
      plot_df <- plot_df |>
        distinct(cluster_id, parent_document_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
    }
    attachment_flag <- as.character(plot_df$has_attachment)
    attachment_flag <- attachment_flag %in% c("TRUE", "True", "true", "1")
    rate_df <- plot_df |>
      transmute(
        cluster_id = as.character(cluster_id),
        attachment_rate = 100 * as.numeric(attachment_flag)
      ) |>
      group_by(cluster_id) |>
      summarise(attachment_rate = mean(attachment_rate, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
    title <- "Share of responses with attachments"
  } else {
    return(NULL)
  }

  cluster_ids <- sort_cluster_ids(unique(rate_df$cluster_id))
  label_tbl <- cluster_label_table(cluster_overview, cluster_ids)

  rate_df |>
    left_join(label_tbl, by = "cluster_id") |>
    mutate(
      cluster_axis_label = factor(cluster_axis_label, levels = rev(label_tbl$cluster_axis_label)),
      title = title
    )
}

plot_attachment_rate_chart <- function(rate_df) {
  if (is.null(rate_df) || nrow(rate_df) == 0) {
    cat("Attachment-rate figure not available yet.")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  line_color <- "#97A6BA"
  point_color <- "#5B7FA3"

  ggplot2::ggplot(rate_df, ggplot2::aes(x = attachment_rate, y = cluster_axis_label)) +
    ggplot2::geom_segment(
      ggplot2::aes(x = 0, xend = attachment_rate, yend = cluster_axis_label),
      linewidth = 1.2,
      colour = line_color
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(size = 3.8, colour = point_color) +
    ggplot2::geom_text(
      ggplot2::aes(label = paste0(round(attachment_rate, 1), "%")),
      hjust = -0.15,
      size = 3.4,
      colour = "#32465A"
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(0, max(100, max(rate_df$attachment_rate, na.rm = TRUE) + 8)),
      breaks = c(0, 25, 50, 75, 100),
      labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
      expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = unique(rate_df$title)[1],
      x = "Rate",
      y = NULL
    ) +
    theme_report_plot() +
    ggplot2::theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()
    )
}

flatten_metadata_signals <- function(payload) {
  if (is.null(payload) || !is.list(payload)) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  rows <- list()
  for (field_name in names(payload)) {
    field_payload <- payload[[field_name]]
    if (!is.list(field_payload)) next
    for (cluster_id in names(field_payload)) {
      cluster_rows <- field_payload[[cluster_id]]
      if (!is.list(cluster_rows)) next
      for (item in cluster_rows) {
        rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
          cluster_id = as.character(cluster_id),
          field = field_name,
          value = item$value %||% NA_character_,
          cluster_count = as.numeric(item$cluster_count %||% NA_real_),
          cluster_share = as.numeric(item$cluster_share %||% NA_real_),
          corpus_share = as.numeric(item$corpus_share %||% NA_real_),
          lift = as.numeric(item$lift %||% NA_real_),
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      }
    }
  }

  if (length(rows) == 0) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  dplyr::bind_rows(rows)
}

flatten_qualitative <- function(payload) {
  if (is.null(payload) || is.null(payload$interpretations)) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(payload$interpretations, function(item) {
    data.frame(
      cluster_id = as.character(item$cluster_id %||% NA_character_),
      frame_label = item$frame_label %||% NA_character_,
      interpretive_summary = item$summary %||% NA_character_,
      distinctive_emphasis = item$distinctive_emphasis %||% NA_character_,
      overlap_warning = item$overlap_warning %||% NA_character_,
      merge_candidate_with = paste(item$merge_candidate_with %||% character(0), collapse = ", "),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }))
}

root_dir <- resolve_root()
config <- yaml::read_yaml(file.path(root_dir, "config", "project_config.yml"))
paths <- config$paths

prepared_df <- safe_read_csv(file.path(root_dir, paths$prepared_corpus))
cluster_df <- safe_read_csv(file.path(root_dir, paths$cluster_assignments))
cluster_summary <- safe_read_csv(file.path(root_dir, paths$cluster_summary))
model_selection <- safe_read_csv(file.path(root_dir, paths$model_selection))
clustering_decision <- safe_read_json(file.path(root_dir, paths$clustering_decision))
centroid_similarity <- safe_read_csv(file.path(root_dir, paths$centroid_similarity))
metadata_summary <- safe_read_json(file.path(root_dir, paths$metadata_summary))
cluster_terms <- safe_read_csv(file.path(root_dir, paths$cluster_terms))
cluster_metadata_signals <- safe_read_json(file.path(root_dir, paths$cluster_metadata_signals))
representative_examples_flat <- safe_read_csv(file.path(root_dir, paths$representative_examples_flat))
validation_summary <- safe_read_json(file.path(root_dir, paths$cluster_validation_summary))
qualitative <- safe_read_json(file.path(root_dir, paths$qualitative_interpretation))
qualitative_global <- if (!is.null(qualitative)) qualitative$global_assessment %||% NULL else NULL
raw_corpus_label <- basename(paths$raw_corpus)

n_units <- metadata_summary$n_units %||% metadata_summary$n_analysis_units %||% NA
n_responses <- metadata_summary$n_retained_responses %||% metadata_summary$n_documents_retained %||% NA
avg_unit_words <- metadata_summary$avg_unit_word_count %||% metadata_summary$avg_word_count %||% NA
avg_response_words <- metadata_summary$avg_response_word_count %||% metadata_summary$avg_word_count %||% NA
avg_units_per_response <- metadata_summary$avg_units_per_response %||% NA
attachment_rate <- if (!is.null(metadata_summary$attachment_rate)) round(100 * as.numeric(metadata_summary$attachment_rate), 1) else NA
chunk_source_counts <- metadata_summary$chunk_source_counts %||% list()
unit_of_analysis <- metadata_summary$unit_of_analysis %||% config$analysis$unit_of_analysis

qualitative_flat <- flatten_qualitative(qualitative)
cluster_overview <- NULL
if (!is.null(cluster_summary)) {
  cluster_overview <- cluster_summary |>
    mutate(
      cluster_id = as.character(cluster_id),
      n_units = as.numeric(n_units %||% n_documents),
      pct_of_units = as.numeric(pct_of_units %||% pct_of_corpus),
      n_parent_responses = as.numeric(n_parent_responses %||% n_documents),
      pct_of_responses = as.numeric(pct_of_responses %||% pct_of_corpus),
      avg_word_count = as.numeric(avg_word_count),
      pct_attachment_sourced_units = as.numeric(pct_attachment_sourced_units %||% NA)
    )

  if (!is.null(qualitative_flat)) {
    cluster_overview <- cluster_overview |>
      left_join(qualitative_flat, by = "cluster_id")
  }
}

response_frame_distribution <- NULL
if (!is.null(cluster_df) && "parent_document_id" %in% names(cluster_df)) {
  response_frame_distribution <- cluster_df |>
    distinct(parent_document_id, cluster_id) |>
    count(parent_document_id, name = "n_frames") |>
    count(n_frames, name = "n_responses") |>
    mutate(pct = round(100 * n_responses / sum(n_responses), 1))
}

multi_frame_share <- NA
if (!is.null(response_frame_distribution)) {
  multi_frame_share <- response_frame_distribution |>
    filter(n_frames > 1) |>
    summarise(pct = round(100 * sum(n_responses) / sum(response_frame_distribution$n_responses), 1)) |>
    pull(pct)
}

metadata_signal_tbl <- flatten_metadata_signals(cluster_metadata_signals)
```

```{=html}
<style>
.executive-summary-box {
  background: #f7fbff;
  border: 1px solid #d9e6f5;
  border-top: 6px solid #2f5aa8;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1.1rem 1.3rem;
  margin: 1rem 0 1.1rem 0;
}

.executive-summary-box h2 {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0.7rem;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
}

.assessment-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  gap: 0.9rem;
  margin: 1rem 0 1.2rem 0;
}

.assessment-card {
  background: #fbfcfe;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 0.9rem 1rem;
}

.assessment-card h3 {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0.45rem;
  font-size: 1rem;
}

.note-box {
  background: #eef5ff;
  border-left: 4px solid #2f5aa8;
  padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
  margin: 0.8rem 0 1rem 0;
}

.validation-box {
  background: #fff8e8;
  border-left: 4px solid #c57a00;
  padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
  margin: 1rem 0 1.2rem 0;
}
</style>
```

# Findings

This run uses `r raw_corpus_label`, retains `r ifelse(is.na(n_responses), "NA", format(n_responses, big.mark = ","))` responses, and analyzes `r ifelse(is.na(n_units), "NA", format(n_units, big.mark = ","))` `r unit_of_analysis` units.

```{r results='asis'}
if (!is.null(qualitative_global)) {
  cat(
    glue(
      "<div class='executive-summary-box'>",
      "<h2>Executive Summary</h2>",
      "<p>{qualitative_global$executive_summary %||% ''}</p>",
      "</div>",
      "<div class='assessment-grid'>",
      "<div class='assessment-card'><h3>Overall Reading</h3><p>{qualitative_global$overall_structure %||% ''}</p></div>",
      "<div class='assessment-card'><h3>Critical Reading</h3><p>{qualitative_global$critical_reading %||% ''}</p></div>",
      "<div class='assessment-card'><h3>Merge Assessment</h3><p>{qualitative_global$merger_assessment %||% ''}</p></div>",
      "</div>"
    )
  )
}
```

```{r}
if (is.null(cluster_overview)) {
  cat("Cluster overview not found yet.")
} else {
  overview_tbl <- cluster_overview |>
    arrange(as.numeric(cluster_id)) |>
    transmute(
      Cluster = paste0("Cluster ", cluster_id),
      Label = frame_label %||% "Interpretive label unavailable",
      Summary = interpretive_summary %||% "Interpretive summary unavailable",
      `Distinctive emphasis` = distinctive_emphasis %||% "",
      `Overlap warning` = overlap_warning %||% "",
      `Merge candidate` = merge_candidate_with %||% "",
      `Share of units` = paste0(round(pct_of_units, 1), "%"),
      `Response coverage` = paste0(round(pct_of_responses, 1), "%")
    )
  knitr::kable(overview_tbl, caption = "Comparative cluster overview")
}
```

```{r fig.width=12.5, fig.height=7.6, fig.cap="Embedding map colored by cluster and labelled with Gemini-assigned frame names."}
plot_cluster_map_with_labels(cluster_df, cluster_overview)
```

```{r results='asis'}
if (!is.na(multi_frame_share)) {
  cat(glue("<div class='note-box'><p>{fmt_pct(multi_frame_share)} of retained responses contain more than one discovered frame.</p></div>"))
}
```

```{r}
if (is.null(response_frame_distribution)) {
  cat("Frame-overlap summary not available yet.")
} else {
  knitr::kable(
    response_frame_distribution,
    caption = "Number of discovered frames represented within each retained response"
  )
}
```

```{r}
if (is.null(representative_examples_flat)) {
  cat("Representative evidence not found yet.")
} else {
  evidence_tbl <- representative_examples_flat |>
    mutate(role = ifelse(is.na(role), "", role)) |>
    group_by(cluster_id, role) |>
    slice_head(n = 1) |>
    ungroup() |>
    arrange(cluster_id, role, distance_to_centroid) |>
    transmute(
      Cluster = paste0("Cluster ", cluster_id),
      Role = role,
      Actor = actor_label,
      Type = user_type,
      Language = language,
      Source = chunk_source,
      Excerpt = excerpt_text(clean_text, 220)
    )
  knitr::kable(evidence_tbl, caption = "Representative evidence used for interpretation")
}
```

# Documentation

## Corpus Snapshot

```{r}
snapshot_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
  Measure = c(
    "Retained responses",
    "Analysis units",
    "Average response words",
    "Average unit words",
    "Average units per response",
    "Response-level attachment rate"
  ),
  Value = c(
    ifelse(is.na(n_responses), NA, format(n_responses, big.mark = ",")),
    ifelse(is.na(n_units), NA, format(n_units, big.mark = ",")),
    ifelse(is.na(avg_response_words), NA, round(avg_response_words, 1)),
    ifelse(is.na(avg_unit_words), NA, round(avg_unit_words, 1)),
    ifelse(is.na(avg_units_per_response), NA, round(avg_units_per_response, 2)),
    ifelse(is.na(attachment_rate), NA, paste0(attachment_rate, "%"))
  )
)
knitr::kable(snapshot_tbl, caption = "Corpus snapshot")
```

```{r}
if (length(chunk_source_counts) == 0) {
  cat("Chunk-source summary not available yet.")
} else {
  chunk_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
    Chunk_source = names(chunk_source_counts),
    Units = as.integer(unlist(chunk_source_counts)),
    Share = round(100 * as.integer(unlist(chunk_source_counts)) / sum(as.integer(unlist(chunk_source_counts))), 1)
  ) |>
    arrange(desc(Units))
  knitr::kable(chunk_tbl, caption = "Where the analysis units come from")
}
```

## Clustering Decision

```{r}
if (is.null(clustering_decision)) {
  cat("Clustering decision manifest not found yet.")
} else {
  decision_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
    Measure = c("Selection metric", "Selected cluster count"),
    Value = c(
      clustering_decision$selection_metric %||% NA_character_,
      clustering_decision$selected_k %||% NA_character_
    )
  )
  knitr::kable(decision_tbl, caption = "Selected clustering solution")
}
```

```{r}
if (is.null(model_selection)) {
  cat("Model-selection metrics not found yet.")
} else {
  metric_cols <- intersect(
    c("cluster_count", "silhouette_score", "davies_bouldin_score", "calinski_harabasz_score", "inertia"),
    names(model_selection)
  )
  knitr::kable(
    model_selection[, metric_cols, drop = FALSE],
    digits = 4,
    caption = "Cluster-model selection metrics"
  )
}
```

```{r}
if (is.null(centroid_similarity)) {
  cat("Centroid-similarity table not found yet.")
} else {
  similarity_tbl <- centroid_similarity |>
    arrange(desc(cosine_similarity)) |>
    head(10) |>
    transmute(
      `Cluster left` = paste0("Cluster ", cluster_left),
      `Cluster right` = paste0("Cluster ", cluster_right),
      `Cosine similarity` = round(cosine_similarity, 4)
    )
  knitr::kable(similarity_tbl, caption = "Most similar cluster-centroid pairs")
}
```

## Metadata Signals

```{r}
if (is.null(metadata_signal_tbl)) {
  cat("Metadata overrepresentation table not found yet.")
} else {
  signal_tbl <- metadata_signal_tbl |>
    arrange(desc(lift), desc(cluster_count)) |>
    head(24) |>
    transmute(
      Cluster = paste0("Cluster ", cluster_id),
      Field = field,
      Value = value,
      `Cluster share` = round(100 * cluster_share, 1),
      `Corpus share` = round(100 * corpus_share, 1),
      Lift = round(lift, 2)
    )
  knitr::kable(signal_tbl, caption = "Most overrepresented metadata values by cluster")
}
```

## Lexical Signals

```{r}
if (is.null(cluster_terms)) {
  cat("Cluster-term table not found yet.")
} else {
  terms_tbl <- cluster_terms |>
    arrange(cluster_id, term_rank) |>
    transmute(
      Cluster = paste0("Cluster ", cluster_id),
      Rank = term_rank,
      Term = term,
      `Cluster share` = round(100 * cluster_doc_share, 1),
      `Corpus share` = round(100 * corpus_doc_share, 1),
      Score = round(salience_score, 6)
    )
  knitr::kable(terms_tbl, caption = "Post hoc lexical signals associated with each cluster")
}
```

## Figures

```{r fig.width=10.8, fig.height=5.9, fig.cap="User-type composition within each cluster, counting each parent response at most once per cluster."}
user_type_share_df <- prepare_cluster_share_data(cluster_df, cluster_overview, "user_type", top_n = 6)
plot_cluster_share_chart(user_type_share_df, "User-type composition within clusters")
```

```{r fig.width=10.8, fig.height=5.9, fig.cap="Language composition within each cluster, counting each parent response at most once per cluster."}
language_share_df <- prepare_cluster_share_data(cluster_df, cluster_overview, "language", top_n = 6)
plot_cluster_share_chart(language_share_df, "Language composition within clusters")
```

```{r fig.width=10.6, fig.height=5.2, fig.cap="Attachment-derived share by cluster."}
attachment_rate_df <- prepare_attachment_rate_data(cluster_df, cluster_overview)
plot_attachment_rate_chart(attachment_rate_df)
```

## Validation

```{r results='asis'}
if (is.null(validation_summary)) {
  cat("<div class='validation-box'><p>Permutation p-value not available yet.</p></div>")
} else {
  p_value <- validation_summary$null_summary$permutation_p_value %||% NA
  cat(
    glue(
      "<div class='validation-box'><p><strong>Permutation p-value:</strong> {format(round(as.numeric(p_value), 4), nsmall = 4)}</p></div>"
    )
  )
}
```
